Entries.Name: Quebec Kweebec
Entries.Line: You see, it's a combination of, like, having this idea that to be French means to scoff at anything deemed « derivative » of France, and just him hating Québec specifically for not giving him the life he wanted.

Entries.Name: Quebec Kweebec
Entries.Line: In a way, you can think of him deluding himself into somehow thinking that random food is beneath him because it's not « noble » enough, as well as him being so aggressively homesick that he feels as passionate as he does about it. Or comes off that way, I mean.

Line.Text: Ironically, it's also the one thing we still bond over. He's too proud now to lift a finger for it himself, but he misses the food from our seedhood. I do my best to recreate it.

Choices.Text: Why do you bother if he's so ungrateful about it?
